transcript:
Agent: Thank you for calling MedAssist Support. This is Karen. How can I help you today?

Customer: Hi Karen. I need to update my health insurance information and also check on a claim.

Agent: Of course. Let me pull up your account. Can I verify your date of birth please?

Customer: Sure, my date of birth is 07/14/1978.

Agent: Thank you. And your Social Security Number for verification?

Customer: It is 523-74-1892.

Agent: Perfect. I have your account here. I can see the claim filed on April 10th. Your insurance member ID is MED-HI-2291847 and your medical record number is MRN-00445521. The claim is for the prescription you were diagnosed with for hypertension — the medication dosage was flagged for review.

Customer: Yes, I was prescribed Lisinopril 10mg. Can you see the status?

Agent: I can see it is under clinical review. The reviewing physician has your full medical history on file. Can I also update your contact details? What is your current email?

Customer: It is robert.haines@personalmail.com. And my phone is 415-882-3301.

Agent: Got it. And do you want to update the card on file for your co-pay? We currently have a Visa ending in 4532.

Customer: Yes please. The new card is 4111 1111 1111 1234, expiry 09/27, CVV 342.

Agent: Thank you. I have updated that. Is there anything else I can help with?

Customer: No, that covers it. Thank you Karen.

Agent: You are welcome. Take care, Robert.
